retainToOmp is declared on the NoesisRuntime interface (src/runtime.ts:25) but never assigned in createRuntime() (src/runtime.ts:35) — it always returns undefined at runtime. The believe-tool (src/tools/believe-tool.ts:91) checks for it defensively before calling, and unit tests (tests/unit/tools/believe-tool.test.ts:106-154) manually wire a mock. The gap is real: the OMP memory bridge callback is a dead plug point. The LATEST_RESEARCH.md (line 140) already documents this gap. Mnemopi (the intended OMP memory backend) was removed in v0.2 per vault-detector.ts.
